summary: P3 Features Testing Complete - All 4 improved features tested: Invoice PDF (6 invoices with PDF download), RFID Admin Management (6 equipment CRUD + 1 rental), Check-in Jour J (progress bar + mobile UX), SMS Templates (6 templates + recipients count). Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Invoice PDF generation API - returns 200 with application/pdf content-type
BACKEND: Admin invoices list API - returns 6 invoices with total_count and total_amount
BACKEND: RFID equipment list API - returns 6 equipment items
BACKEND: RFID admin stats API - returns total_equipment, pending_rentals, confirmed_rentals, total_revenue
BACKEND: RFID admin rentals API - returns rental requests
BACKEND: RFID equipment CRUD - create, update, delete all working
BACKEND: RFID rental processing (confirm/reject) - working
BACKEND: SMS templates API - returns 6 predefined templates
BACKEND: SMS recipients count API - returns total and with_phone counts
BACKEND: SMS history API - returns notification history
BACKEND: Check-in stats API - returns checked_in, remaining, total, percentage
BACKEND: Check-in search API - working
FRONTEND: Admin Invoices Tab - 6 invoices displayed, 225€ total, PDF download buttons
FRONTEND: Admin RFID Tab - 6 equipment, stats cards (6 EQUIPEMENTS, 1 LOCATIONS TOTALES, 0 EN ATTENTE, 1 CONFIRMÉES, 360€ REVENUS)
FRONTEND: RFID Equipment CRUD - Add button, Edit/Delete buttons, form dialog with all fields
FRONTEND: RFID Rentals - rental displayed with Confirmer/Refuser/Marquer retourne buttons
FRONTEND: Check-in Page - Event list (20 events), progress bar, scan zone, participant list
FRONTEND: Check-in Section in Organizer - 'Mode Check-in Jour J' link to /checkin visible
FRONTEND: SMS Section - Twilio notice, event selector, template selector (6 templates), message input, send button
FRONTEND: SMS Templates - Rappel J-1, Horaire modifie, Resultats disponibles, Remerciement, Alerte meteo, Retrait dossard
FRONTEND: SMS Recipients Count - displays 'X participant(s), X avec numero de telephone'
FRONTEND: SMS History - shows previous SMS with status EN FILE D'ATTENTE
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed RFID equipment during backend testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 Features fully tested and working: (1) Invoice PDF with organizer branding - /api/invoices/{id}/pdf endpoint returns proper PDF with branded header, (2) RFID Admin - full CRUD on equipment + rental management with stats, (3) Check-in Jour J - /checkin page with event selection, progress bar, scan zone, participant list, (4) SMS - templates API returns 6 templates, recipients count works, Twilio MOCKED (not configured - SMS stored in queue). All backend APIs verified with pytest, all frontend components verified with Playwright.

invoice_pdf.details: 6 invoices available, PDF download returns 200 with proper headers

rfid_admin.details: 6 equipment items, full CRUD, 1 confirmed rental, stats displayed

checkin_jour_j.details: Event list, progress bar (percentage display), scan zone, participant list

sms_templates.details: 6 templates available, recipients count works, Twilio not configured so SMS saved to queue only

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Not configured - SMS notifications saved to DB queue only, not actually sent
